note: Block detail now surfaces the miner address (always) and the lottery winner address (only on Phase 2 PAYOUT triggered blocks where lottery_payout > 0). The miner row uses the coinbase miner output's pkh; the lottery row is hidden on rollover/UPDATE blocks and pre-V11_PHASE2_HEIGHT. Both rows are clickable and link to the address detail panel. Auto-reload: open tabs refresh within ~60 s; if cached, hard reload with Ctrl+Shift+R.
